name: SafeSpace Global Corp
business: SafeSpace Global Corporation is a multimodal AI technology solutions company that markets products and solutions utilizing advanced AI tools to monitor and enhance resident safety, reduce injury risks, and improve care efficiency across senior living, schools, transit systems, correctional facilities, and commercial infrastructure.

exposures.sentence: SafeSpace Fall Monitoring, which utilizes advanced AI monitoring tools to enhance resident safety in senior living, reduce the risk of injuries, and improve overall care efficiency.
SafeFace Access Control An advanced solution that leverages facial recognition to automatically and instantly unlock doors for registered staff and visitors.
Local data storage ensures security and cost efficiency, saving countless hours in investigations.
SafeSchool is designed to address growing concerns around school safety by proactively detecting weapons and identifying persons of concern through real-time AI-based monitoring.

catalysts.event: strategic test pilot program with the Kansas City Area Transportation Authority in preparation for the FIFA World Cup 2026
catalysts.sentence: On June 26, 2025, we announced a strategic test pilot program with the Kansas City Area Transportation Authority in preparation for the FIFA World Cup 2026.
